name: greenhorn-onboarding
description: 🟢 Point an agent here. Give it a PAT. Watch it find its place. Zero-config fleet onboarding for the Cocapn Fleet.

name: brothers-keeper
description: The Lighthouse Keeper — external watchdog for agent runtimes (ZeroClaw fork). Watches resources, kills risky processes, restarts gateways, keeps operational logs from outside the instance.

name: capitaine
description: Capitaine — fork a repo, click Codespaces, the agent is alive. The repo IS the agent.

name: brothers-keeper
description: The Lighthouse Keeper — external watchdog for agent runtimes (ZeroClaw fork). Watches resources, kills risky processes, restarts gateways, keeps operational logs from outside the instance.

name: iron-to-iron
description: I2I — Agent-to-agent communication through git. Iron sharpens iron. We don't talk, we commit.

name: SuperInstance
description: 🌀 The Ocean of Agents — Navigate the currents, harness the winds, join the fleet.

name: greenhorn-runtime
description: 🟢 Portable agent runtime in Go, C, C++, CUDA. Download, deploy, specialize. Plants agents anywhere within hardware/API limits.

name: oracle1-vessel
description: 🔮 Oracle1 — Lighthouse Keeper of the Cocapn fleet. Git-Agent embodiment.

name: cuda-rbac
description: Role-based access control — roles, permissions, inheritance, deny rules (Rust)

name: cuda-state-machine
description: State machines — FSM, hierarchical states, guards, transitions, persistence (Rust)

name: cuda-observer
description: Observer pattern — reactive subscriptions, signal propagation, change detection (Rust)

name: cuda-event
description: Event system — pub/sub, event sourcing, replay, dead letter queue (Rust)

name: cuda-discovery
description: Service discovery — agent registration, health probing, capability lookup, fleet directory (Rust)

name: cuda-lock
description: Distributed locking — mutex, read-write, leases, deadlock detection (Rust)

name: cuda-serializer
description: Serialization — binary encoding, message framing, schema evolution, varint (Rust)

name: cuda-mesh
description: Service mesh — discovery, load balancing, health checking, traffic routing (Rust)

name: cuda-cache
description: Caching — LRU eviction, TTL expiration, namespaces, hit/miss stats (Rust)

name: cuda-logging
description: Structured logging — levels, context propagation, rotation, filtering, export (Rust)

name: cuda-retry
description: Retry — exponential backoff, jitter, circuit breaker, resilient execution patterns (Rust)

name: cuda-rate-limit
description: Rate limiting — token bucket, sliding window, per-agent quotas, backpressure (Rust)
